name: Hero_Editorial_Teasing_v1
positive_prompt: photorealistic 16:9 hero studio shot of adult woman, sustained eye contact, dramatic cinematic side lighting, elegant confident pose, natural fabric physics
negative_prompt: blurry, deformed, extra figures, flat lighting, static pose, watermark, text
notes: Strong single-subject hero with eye contact and physics. Good base for variations.

recommended_settings.camera_movement: use explicit camera language in positive prompt
